summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 3 features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Owner dashboard with Restaurant CRUD, Admin management with time periods, Admin dashboard with dark sidebar, Venues/Tables page, Users page with edit/delete/toggle, and ActiveTablesPage with close button correctly placed ONLY inside modal.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning) - minor

critical_code_review_comments: Close button correctly placed ONLY inside the details modal in ActiveTablesPage.js (data-testid='close-session-in-modal')
Admin PIN guard working correctly (PIN: 5159 from settings)
Cascade delete working: Restaurant deletion cascades to users, Admin deletion cascades to staff
All UI text is in Azerbaijani language as required
Modern design system with terracotta accent (#C05C3D) and forest green sidebar (#1A251E)
Small fonts used throughout the UI as specified
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed restaurants and users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 3 features tested and working. Owner can create/edit/delete restaurants and manage admins with time periods. Admin can manage venues/tables and users. Close button is correctly placed ONLY inside the session detail modal. Admin PIN is 5159.

features_tested.owner_login: PASS - Modern login page with split layout, redirects to /owner
features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Redirects to modern admin dashboard with dark sidebar
features_tested.restaurant_crud: PASS - Create, edit, delete, toggle status all working
features_tested.admin_management_time_periods: PASS - Create admin with expiration (5 days, 2 weeks, 1 month, etc.)
features_tested.admin_edit_password_expiration: PASS - Update password and extend expiration working
features_tested.admin_delete: PASS - Delete button works, cascades to staff
features_tested.venues_tables_page: PASS - Navigate to Məkan & Masalar, create/edit/delete venues and tables
features_tested.users_page: PASS - Navigate to İstifadəçilər with edit/delete/toggle status
features_tested.active_tables_close_button: PASS - Close button is ONLY inside modal, NOT on main card
features_tested.order_editing: PASS - PUT /api/orders/{id} updates items and total_amount
features_tested.cascade_delete_restaurant: PASS - DELETE /api/restaurants/{id} cascades to delete users
features_tested.cascade_delete_user: PASS - DELETE /api/users/{id} cascades to delete staff
features_tested.modern_ui_design: PASS - Terracotta accent, forest green sidebar, small fonts

close_button_verification.condition: Only renders when selectedSession?.is_active is true
close_button_verification.main_card_buttons: Only 'Detallara Bax' (View Details) button on main session cards
